Spokane, the Playground of the Nation

↩ back Item Info
Click to view full screen
View on Timeline View on Map Download JPEG
Title:
Spokane, the Playground of the Nation
Creator:
Algemeen Handelsblad
Date Created:
1931-01-31
Description:
Article in the Amsterdam-based newspaper, Algemeen Handelsblad, describing the history of Dutch investment in Spokane, WA.
Subjects:
newspapers articles urban development street scenes pedestrians
Location:
Amsterdam, NL
Latitude:
52.36763599
Longitude:
4.899494781

Delpher
